Compute Step Derivative for Newton Update

Source: R/cubic_woodbury.R
woodbury_step_deriv.Rd

Computes the second-order inverse (B + lambdaI)^-2 times g, which equals (B + lambdaI)^-1 times s, for the Newton derivative of the secular equation.

Usage

woodbury_step_deriv(lambda, s, gamma, w_wt, c_inv, w)

Arguments

lambda

Current regularization parameter.

s

Current step vector.

gamma

Scaling parameter.

w_wt

Precomputed w times t(w).

c_inv

Precomputed inverse of c_mat.

w

Low-rank update matrix.

Value

Vector equal to (B + lambda*I) inverse times s.

On this page
